stories.title: Implement Journey 4: SEO & Link Integrity crawl
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/04-seo-links.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) Fetch /sitemap.xml, parse all <loc> URLs, HTTP GET each one, assert 200. (2) Navigate to homepage, collect ALL <a href> elements, filter internal links (ai-grija.ro), click each one, verify destination is not 404 and not the homepage when it shouldn't be. (3) Navigate to /#/quiz, /#/amenintari, /#/alerte/apel-fals-ing-romania-2025 and collect+click all links. Write results to e2e/results/04-seo-links.json: {total_links, passed, failed, failures: [{url, status, reason}]}. BASE_URL from env or default https://ai-grija.ro.

stories.title: Implement Journey 6: Visual Consistency checks
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/06-visual-consistency.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) For each page (/, /#/quiz, /#/amenintari, /#/alerte/apel-fals-ing-romania-2025, /alerte/apel-fals-ing-romania-2025), check that document.body background-color is dark (each RGB channel < 50). Flag any page with light background. (2) Check hero terminal box: get all lines of the canvas alt-text or the pre-rendered text, verify left border chars align vertically with right border chars. (3) At 3 viewports (375, 768, 1440), verify document.body.scrollWidth <= viewport width (no horizontal overflow). Write results to e2e/results/06-visual.json.

stories.title: Implement Journey 7: Data Freshness & Loading States
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/07-data-freshness.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) Navigate to /, wait 5s, check counter text does NOT contain 'Se încarcă' or 'Loading' — it should show a number. (2) Scroll to campaigns section, verify cards appear (not spinner). (3) Navigate to /#/quiz, verify question text appears within 3s. (4) Navigate to ALL routes, after 5s check no element with text matching /loading|se incarca|spinner/i is visible. Write results to e2e/results/07-freshness.json.

stories.title: Implement Journey 2: Campaign Alert Deep-Dive
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/02-campaign-deepdive.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) Navigate to /, scroll to campaigns. (2) Click FIRST campaign card. (3) Assert navigation happened in SINGLE click (URL changed). (4) On the detail page, assert background is dark (not light scheme). (5) Assert detail has: title, severity badge, target entity, date. (6) Click 'Back to alerts' or back link, verify return to homepage. Also test the SSR route directly: navigate to /alerte/apel-fals-ing-romania-2025, verify background-color is dark. Write results to e2e/results/02-campaign.json.

stories.title: Implement Journey 1: First-Time Visitor flow
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/01-visitor-check.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) Navigate to /, wait for hero terminal animation (5s). (2) Verify counter shows a number (not loading text). (3) Scroll to checker form, verify textarea visible. (4) Type a suspicious message into the textarea. (5) Click the submit/check button. (6) Wait up to 15s for verdict card to appear. (7) Verify verdict contains 'phishing' or 'suspicious' or 'likely_safe'. (8) Verify confidence is a number. Note: this test hits the real AI endpoint so it may be slow. Write results to e2e/results/01-visitor.json.

stories.title: Implement Journey 3: Language Switching consistency
stories.description: Create e2e/journeys/03-language-switch.spec.ts. Using Playwright: (1) Navigate to / in English (default). (2) Record all nav text. (3) Click language switcher, verify dropdown shows flags + full names (not clipped). (4) Switch to Romanian, verify ALL nav items changed (no English text remaining like 'Check' or 'Alerts'). (5) Navigate to /#/amenintari, verify heading is Romanian ('Amenințări' not 'Threats'). (6) Switch back to English, verify nav is fully English (no 'Mai mult'). (7) Navigate to /#/quiz, verify quiz title is in current language. Write results to e2e/results/03-language.json.
